sequences.description: Category label ('auto'), H1 title, author photo + name + date + read time, social share icons, hero image
sequences.reason: Structured blog header with metadata (author image, name, date, read time, social sharing) requires block structure. Not achievable with just default content typing.
sequences.notes: Combines category tag, article title, author info bar with photo, and hero image into one cohesive block. Social share links can be part of metadata.

sequences.description: H2 'Article overview', introductory paragraphs, bulleted list of article contents
sequences.reason: Author can type heading, paragraphs, and bullet list normally in a document.

sequences.description: Image of couple shaking hands with car salesperson
sequences.reason: Single inline image - author inserts it in the document flow.

sequences.description: H2 'Quick car buying checklist', three checklist items with checkmark emojis for Used Cars, New Cars, and Both
sequences.reason: Author can type heading and text with emojis/bold formatting normally.

sequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask when buying a used car', intro paragraph, 6 numbered H3 questions with explanatory paragraphs and bullet lists
sequences.reason: Long-form article text with headings, paragraphs, lists, and inline links. Author types this normally.

sequences.description: Inline CTA: 'Need some tips on how to trade in your car?' with 'Read More Today' button
sequences.reason: Styled callout box with colored background, text, and prominent button. Structured component that requires block decoration.
sequences.notes: Single-row cards block used as inline promotional callout. One row with text + link.

sequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask when buying a new car', intro paragraph, 6 numbered H3 questions with explanatory paragraphs
sequences.reason: Long-form article text with headings, paragraphs, and inline links. Author types normally.

sequences.description: Image of car dealer showing customer car engine
sequences.reason: Single inline image - author inserts in document flow.

sequences.description: H2 'Questions to ask about financing and loan terms', paragraph, 4 bulleted Q&A items. H2 'Negotiation and online buying tips', intro paragraph.
sequences.reason: Article text with headings, paragraphs, bullet lists, and inline links. Author types normally.

sequences.description: Inline CTA: 'Shopping for a new car? Try these three ways to reduce insurance rates.' with 'Read More' button
sequences.reason: Same styled callout pattern as seq-4-2. Structured CTA component.

sequences.description: H2 'Negotiation tips and online car buying questions', H3 subsections with bullet lists and closing paragraphs
sequences.reason: Article text with headings, subheadings, bullet lists, and paragraphs. Author types normally.

sequences.description: Inline CTA: 'AAA-owned Car Care Centers provide pre-inspections' with 'Find a Facility' button
sequences.reason: Same styled callout pattern. Structured CTA component.

sequences.description: H2 'How will the car affect my insurance rate?', paragraph, 3 bullet items, closing paragraph
sequences.reason: Article text with heading, paragraphs, and bullet list. Author types normally.

sequences.description: Prominent end CTA with eyebrow 'buying a car', title 'Explore car options with a trusted brand – AAA', description, 'Get Help' button
sequences.reason: Prominent CTA component with eyebrow text, title, description paragraph, and button. More complex than inline CTA but same cards pattern.
sequences.notes: This is a more prominent CTA variant with eyebrow + title + description + button.

sequences.description: H4 'Banking Disclosure' followed by legal disclaimer paragraphs
sequences.reason: Legal text with heading and paragraphs. Author types normally. Styling is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: H2 'Other Articles You May Like', grid of 3 article cards each with image, category tag, title, author and read time
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern: 3 items in a grid, each with image, tag, title, and metadata. Classic cards block usage.
sequences.notes: 3 article cards with images. Each card: image | tag + title + author/read time. Section has grey background → section-metadata style='grey'.

cards.structure: N rows, 2 columns each: [image | heading, paragraph(s)]
